ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "sample_name" TEXT /* Sample name or identifier */,
  "donor_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "donor_age_at_diagnosis" INTEGER /* Age of the patient at diagnosis */,
  "donor_age_at_last_follow_up" INTEGER /* Age of the patient at last follow-up */,
  "donor_vital_status" TEXT /* Current vital status of the patient */,
  "disease_status_last_follow_up" TEXT /* Disease status at last follow-up */,
  "donor_relapse_interval_in_DAYS" INTEGER /* Interval in days between diagnosis and relapse */,
  "donor_survival_time_in_DAYS" INTEGER /* Survival time in days since diagnosis */,
  "donor_interval_of_last_follow_up_in_DAYS" INTEGER /* Interval in days between diagnosis and last follow-up */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the patient in meters */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the patient in kilograms */,
  "family_history" TEXT /* Family history of breast cancer */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* List of allergies */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatments" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient */,
  "treatment_type" TEXT /* Type of treatment administered */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the treatment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the treatment */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage of the treatment */,
  "response_to_treatment" TEXT /* Patient's response to the treatment */,
  "adverse_effects" TEXT /* Adverse effects of the treatment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatments_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "follow_ups" (
  "follow_up_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each follow-up record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date of the follow-up appointment */,
  "disease_status" TEXT /* Disease status at the follow-up appointment */,
  "treatment_response" TEXT /* Treatment response at the follow-up appointment */,
  "survival_time_in_DAYS" INTEGER /* Survival time in days since diagnosis */,
  "relapse_interval_in_DAYS" INTEGER /* Interval in days between diagnosis and relapse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("follow_up_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_follow_ups_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stages" (
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stage */,
  "stage_name" TEXT /* Name of the stage */,
  "stage_description" TEXT /* Description of the stage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade */,
  "grade_name" TEXT /* Name of the grade */,
  "grade_description" TEXT /* Description of the grade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mutations" (
  "mutation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mutation */,
  "mutation_name" TEXT /* Name of the mutation */,
  "mutation_description" TEXT /* Description of the mutation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mutation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "histopathological_subtypes" (
  "subtype_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subtype */,
  "subtype_name" TEXT /* Name of the subtype */,
  "subtype_description" TEXT /* Description of the subtype */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subtype_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "smoking_histories" (
  "smoking_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each smoking history */,
  "smoking_status" TEXT /* Smoking status */,
  "smoking_history_description" TEXT /* Description of the smoking history */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("smoking_history_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "other_exposures" (
  "exposure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exposure */,
  "exposure_name" TEXT /* Name of the exposure */,
  "exposure_description" TEXT /* Description of the exposure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exposure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parity" (
  "parity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parity status */,
  "parity_status" TEXT /* Parity status */,
  "parity_description" TEXT /* Description of the parity status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "oral_contraception_exposure" (
  "oral_contraception_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each oral contraception status */,
  "oral_contraception_status" TEXT /* Oral contraception status */,
  "oral_contraception_description" TEXT /* Description of the oral contraception status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("oral_contraception_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "menopausal_statuses" (
  "menopausal_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each menopausal status */,
  "menopausal_status" TEXT /* Menopausal status */,
  "menopausal_status_description" TEXT /* Description of the menopausal status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("menopausal_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "HRT_history" (
  "HRT_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each HRT status */,
  "HRT_status" TEXT /* HRT status */,
  "HRT_description" TEXT /* Description of the HRT status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("HRT_history_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "DCIS_grades" (
  "DCIS_grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each DCIS grade */,
  "DCIS_grade" TEXT /* DCIS grade */,
  "DCIS_grade_description" TEXT /* Description of the DCIS grade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("DCIS_grade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lymph_node_counts" (
  "lymph_node_count_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lymph node count */,
  "lymph_node_count" TEXT /* Lymph node count */,
  "lymph_node_count_description" TEXT /* Description of the lymph node count */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lymph_node_count_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ER_status" (
  "ER_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ER status */,
  "ER_status" TEXT /* ER status */,
  "ER_status_description" TEXT /* Description of the ER status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ER_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "PR_status" (
  "PR_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each PR status */,
  "PR_status" TEXT /* PR status */,
  "PR_status_description" TEXT /* Description of the PR status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("PR_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "HER2_status" (
  "HER2_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each HER2 status */,
  "HER2_status" TEXT /* HER2 status */,
  "HER2_status_description" TEXT /* Description of the HER2 status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("HER2_status_id")
)
